# ManagedAppConfigurationProvider

**Class**

A class that provides configurations that an MDM admin provisions for a managed app or extension.

## Declaration

```swift
class ManagedAppConfigurationProvider
```

## Overview

This class provides objects of a type you define, which decodes and validates the configuration that the framework receives from the MDM server.

The framework ingests the configuration in the form of a property list that the MDM server provides and passes to your type as a [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/Decoder]. Your type conforms to [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/Decodable] and parses the configuration according to your specification that the server admin conforms to when creating the property list.

If the decoder encounters a problem, it throws an error that the MDM admin can find in the device’s event log.

## Initializing a configuration provider

- **init()**: Initializes a configuration provider.

## Accessing configurations

- **configurations(_:)**: Provides an asynchronous sequence of configurations that the MDM admin specifies.

## Configuration

- **Specifying and decoding a configuration**: Publish a configuration specification and implement a decoder that parses and validates configuration provided by an MDM admin.
